stopConditions: Two consecutive tool failures on the same operation
Implementation diverges from compiled blueprint intent

Failure mode reached: ProvenanceChainRecord count is less than 10 — some components never had a chain initialized, likely because the collapsed component at ordinal-3 did not get its own chain; a ProvenanceChainHop has isTraced=false because the toLabel entity does not exist in ENTEntityMap — extraction was skipped for this component; one or more ProvenanceChainRecord entries have provenanceIntact=false — gate evaluation will fail if this is not corrected

Failure mode reached: ProvenanceChainRecord for ordinal-3 component does not exist — it was never initialized because the component was flagged as a gap component; postcode computation for resolution record fails due to missing actorId — resolution was performed by an automated process with no actor context; C3AssignmentGap.state is written as resolved but isResolved remains false due to a partial write failure — state and flag are inconsistent

Failure mode reached: pnpm workspace configuration does not declare one or more of the 8 WorkspacePackageNode packages — packages are invisible to the workspace build graph; import graph scan discovers a circular dependency between two ENT-stage packages — e.g. entity-extraction imports from provenance-chain and vice versa; affected file list is incomplete because some packages use dynamic require() instead of static imports — these are invisible to static analysis
requiredEvidence: all 10 ProvenanceChainRecord entries have provenanceIntact=true AND every ProvenanceChainHop has isTraced=true AND no hop has a null provenanceRecordPostcode

C3AssignmentGap.state=resolved AND resolutionProvenancePostcode is non-null AND ProvenanceChainRecord for ordinal-3 has a hop referencing the resolution provenance AND C3AssignmentGap.resolvedPackage is set
affected MonorepoSourceFile list is complete AND dependency graph shows all transitive import chains AND no circular dependencies exist among ENT-stage type definitions
